name: Arcland Service Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Arcland Service Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the management of restaurants in Japan. The company also develops and franchises FC specialty stores; and manufactures and sells processed meat products and various frozen foods. It operates 461 stores, including 406 stores in Japan and 55 stores internationally. The company was formerly known as ArcLand Service Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Arcland Service Holdings Co., Ltd. in July 2016. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Arcland Service Holdings Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Arcland Sakamoto Co., Ltd.
